title: ROS 2 UGV Navigation Stack
description: Our custom navigation and localization package tailored for outdoor off-road UGV platforms, built on top of ROS 2 Nav2 and Robot Localization.

title: Lviv Off-Road UGV Dataset
description: A multi-sensor dataset containing stereo camera images, 3D LiDAR scans, IMU readings, and RTK-GPS trajectories across mixed off-road terrains.

title: UGV Hardware Build Guide
description: Detailed mechanical assembly steps, electrical wiring schematics, and sensor integration brackets/mounts for our reference UGV chassis.

title: Sensor Calibration Toolbox
description: An easy-to-use Python and C++ toolbox for spatial and temporal calibration of camera-to-LiDAR and LiDAR-to-IMU setups.

title: Introduction to ROS 2 & Gazebo
description: An onboarding tutorial slide-deck and repository for students new to ROS 2 development and vehicle simulation in Gazebo.
